questions.question_text: How would you prioritize features when you have limited engineering resources?
questions.ideal_answer: Use framework like RICE (Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort) or value vs. effort matrix. Consider business goals, user needs, technical dependencies, and strategic alignment.

questions.question_text: Tell me about a time when stakeholders disagreed on product direction. How did you handle it?
questions.ideal_answer: Should demonstrate: gathering perspectives, using data to inform decisions, finding common ground, clear communication, making tough calls when needed.
